# AI Agent Rules

## Project Information
- **Author Context:** The author of this project is from sunny Vietnam 🇻🇳.

## Preparation for Work
Before starting any task, you MUST read and study the contents of the `ai-prompt.txt` file in the project root. This file contains:
- Current system instructions and global project context.
- SCSS coding standards and mandatory mixins.
- Class naming conventions (BEM) and component structure rules.
- Color palette and theme management guidelines.
- Responsive design and media query requirements.

Studying this file is critical to ensuring consistency with the design system and project architecture.
